sql.title: SQL for Beginners
sql.description: Learn SQL from zero with hands-on practice.
sql.moreComingSoon: More SQL for Beginners lessons are coming soon.

sql_module_13.title: Creating Tables and Database Structure
sql_module_13.description: Introduce schema design so learners can build small databases instead of only querying prebuilt ones.
outcomes: Create basic relational tables with sensible data types.
Use core constraints to protect data quality.
Explain why schema choices affect future queries.
why: Builds confidence with creating tables and database structure.
Prepares learners for the next skills in the course.

section_13_1.title: Intro to Table Design
section_13_1.description: Learn what CREATE TABLE does and how clear column choices shape the future database.

section_13_2.title: Common Data Types
section_13_2.description: Choose beginner-friendly data types for integers, text, decimals, dates, and times.

section_13_3.title: Constraints
section_13_3.description: Use constraints like PRIMARY KEY, NOT NULL, UNIQUE, and FOREIGN KEY to protect data quality.

section_13_4.title: Table Design Practice
section_13_4.description: Design and create simple tables, then connect them with keys in a small relational structure.
